title: Kernel bootstrap for this Codex session. summary_text: **Findings (before first acknowledgement, high → low)** - **Critical:** fail-closed を launcher が迂回できます。`codex-kernel-guard launch` が失敗しても `|| true` で握りつぶし、最後に `codex-prompt-launch kernel` へフォールバックします。これだと「3-voice shape を作れないなら fail closed」に反します。 [kernel launcher](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/kernel#L63), [kernel launcher](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/kernel#L64), [kernel prompt rule](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L61) - **Critical:** bootstrap receipt が「実稼働レーン証跡」より先に書かれます。launch 時点で記録される provider success は `codex` のみで、`glm`/specialist の成功証跡を待っていません。 [guard launch write](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L532), [guard records codex only](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L533), [health requires glm success](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh#L216), [health requires specialist success](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh#L222), [kernel prompt rule](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L72) - **High:** `glm-fail` で mode 変更しても receipt を更新しません。prompt は「Kernel mode changes で receipt 更新必須」ですが、実装は GLM state と ledger 更新のみです。 [glm-fail implementation](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L751), [glm-fail implementation](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L758), [prompt mode-change update rule](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L99) - **High:** specialist 選択が固定順 (`gemini -> cursor -> copilot`) かつ command 存在確認のみで、health/quota ベースの動的選択を launch が使っていません。 [fixed order in launch](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L416), [fixed order in launch](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L424), [specialist_available only binary check](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L374), [picker has dynamic scoring but not used here](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-specialist-picker.sh#L278), [prompt dynamic-selection rule](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L30) - **High:** `glm unavailable at bootstrap` 時の即時 degraded 形 (`codex + specialist + specialist`) へ自動遷移しません。現状は mode を GLM state だけで決め、normal なら `glm_credentials_present` 不足で即 fail です。 [mode resolution](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L513), [normal path enforces glm creds](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L486), [prompt degraded-at-bootstrap rule](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L35) - **Medium:** 「6 active lanes」を実測していません。`lane_count`/`manifest_lane_count` は launch 時に数値を書くだけで、実レーン稼働検証はありません。 [lane minimum check is constant](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L477), [receipt write uses configured count](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L532), [receipt accepts provided counts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh#L50), [prompt active-lanes requirement](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L58) **Current run evidence** - 指定 run は現在 `invalid` で、理由は `degraded-specialist-count-insufficient`（`glm_mode=degraded-allowed`, specialist success 0）でした。これは上記「mode 変更時 receipt 更新なし」と整合します。
